developer_response.body:
Hi!

Thank you for the feedback and for playing PolSu Action Arcade.

We are very sorry to hear about the issues you’re having with the game and would like to know in more detail what went wrong so we can improve the experience. For example some helpful details would be if the glitching is related to visuals or input and if it happens within every game mode or not. Feel free to add the info on the review or contact us at immortalpiginteractive@gmail.com.
